prompt: { "type": "anime promotional poster", "subject": { "character": "{argument name=\"character name\" default=\"Mayoi Hachikuji\"}", "appearance": "young anime girl, dark brown hair in twin tails, white headband, green hair ribbons, white short-sleeve collared shirt, dark blue pleated skirt with suspenders, green bead bracelet on left wrist", "accessories": "large pink backpack with an orange and white top section, a small green bear plushie peeking out of a pocket", "pose": "looking back over her shoulder, smiling brightly, left hand making a peace sign near her face" }, "environment": "faded, slightly blurred outdoor scene with falling pink cherry blossom petals", "layout": { "style": "official anime key visual, highly detailed typography, pastel pink and white color palette", "text_elements": [ { "position": "top-left", "text": "<Monogatari> Series OFF & MONSTER SPIN-OFF" }, { "position": "mid-left vertical", "text": "{argument name=\"main character text\" default=\"八九寺真宵\"}", "subtext": "MAYOI HACHIKUJI" }, { "position": "top-right badge", "text": "Completely New <Monogatari> Series Spin-off" }, { "position": "mid-right vertical", "text": "{argument name=\"catchphrase\" default=\"困ったときの、まよいちゃんだよ\"}" }, { "position": "bottom-left block", "text": "{argument name=\"broadcast date\" default=\"2024年 7月6日(土) 24:00より\"}", "subtext": "Broadcast starts on TOKYO MX, BS11, ABEMA, etc." }, { "position": "bottom-right title", "text": "{argument name=\"series title\" default=\"傾物語 カブキモノガタリ -まよいキョンシー-\"}" }, { "position": "bottom-left corner", "text": "STAFF and CAST credits" }, { "position": "bottom-right angled box", "text": "synopsis paragraph starting with 'This is a story watching over a girl's growth'" }, { "position": "bottom-right corner", "text": "<Monogatari> Series logo" } ] } }
translatedPrompt: 一张动漫宣传海报，画面中一位少女回眸微笑并比出剪刀手。她留着黑色双马尾，戴着白色发带和绿色发圈，身穿带有红色丝带的白衬衫和深蓝色短裙。她背着一个巨大的粉色背包，上面有生物图案、绿色小熊玩偶和名牌。背景是模糊的粉色街道，樱花飘落。左上角的文字叠加层显示“Monogatari Series OFF & MONSTER SPIN-OFF”。左侧的大型竖排文字为 {argument name="character name" default="八九寺真宵"}。右上角的粉色徽章写着“全新物语系列外传”。右侧的竖排文字为 {argument name="catchphrase" default="困ったときの、まよいちゃんだよ"}。右下角展示了发光的标题 {argument name="main title" default="倾物语"} 和副标题 {argument name="subtitle" default="-真宵僵尸-"}。左下角显示了以 {argument name="broadcast date" default="2024 年 7 月 6 日"} 开头的播出详情及制作人员名单。右下角的白色方框内包含剧情简介和系列 Logo。

breakdown.creativeCore: 动漫宣传海报：生成一张精美的动漫风格宣传海报，包含角色肖像、艺术字体和播出信息。
breakdown.subject: 人物
breakdown.bestUse: 活动海报、品牌主视觉、展览宣传、社媒封面

analysis.copyTemplate:
Create a 海报/封面 image for [用途/受众].

Main subject:
[主体]，[数量/状态/动作]，[关键外观/材质/身份]。

Scene:
[地点/环境]，[时间/天气/时代]，[背景元素]。

Composition:
[参考构图: vertical]。

Visual style:
[参考风格: anime]。

Lighting and camera:
[光线/镜头/景深/质感]。

Text requirements:
文字是主视觉。

Quality constraints:
clean, coherent, polished, readable hierarchy, no random text, no visual clutter.
